title: Flowering Armor
description: A simple texture pack that makes your armor more.... colorful?
body:
# What is this texture?
A simple Texture pack that adds flowers to the armors, it has 2 version, the one with flowers around the helmet and the other one where the helmet is a flower crown :3

In case of issues, report to me on **voidtyron** in discord

## Compatible Versions
Made for 1.20 but compatible with 1.12 (i tested it, and it is probally compatible with any version between those two)
It also works on bedrock! **[Click here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/flowering-armor/)** to get the bedrock version

![Normal Version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aUFL4y9R/images/991063c6482173c9e96c47512ef145a59297e3b9.png)

![Version With Flower Crown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aUFL4y9R/images/2f013fcfcbae06acaaad19ffd1741a22656177a0.png)
